human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for packaging-line specificity, authority-source quality, lifecycle-state clarity, label and code-date evidence handling, traceability and release boundary handling, and validated spec-pack completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to food and beverage packaging-line execution, line readiness, approved artwork and label evidence, blocked-work escalation, lot and pallet traceability, and completion evidence.

Authority sources cover FDA preventive controls, eCFR cGMP and traceability posture, FDA traceability and recall boundaries, GS1 traceability and event standards, and SQFI packaging-line operating references.

Evaluation scenarios cover normal in-scope execution, missing prerequisites, artwork and supplier boundary rejection, traceability conflicts, quality holds, unsupported completion, conflicting-policy escalation, execution exceptions, release-authority rejection, and tenant-specific adaptation.

The package is organized under catalog/naics-overlays/food-and-beverage-manufacturing/packaging-line-specialist/ so packaging-line execution remains distinct from adjacent quality, production planning, inventory, procurement, supplier-quality, and logistics lanes.
Manifest and deployment notes keep runtime strategy as specification-based with explicit promotion criteria for retained implementation.

review_notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguities were left in the research contract coverage.
Boundary enforcement remained strong around final quality release, regulatory label approval, engineering change approval, supplier approval, recall authority, and shipment-release authority.

notes: This package is suitable as a validated packaging line specialist for line readiness, packaging execution, blocked-work handling, label and code-date evidence, lot and pallet traceability, and completion evidence capture.
Runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted retained implementation exists.
Functionality coverage is complete in both the evaluation results and the functional audit record.
